issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.
Placeholders like TEMPLATE_ID and DISCOVERY_RULE_ID are used without guidance on how to replace them, reducing immediate usability.
The instructions assume Ubuntu and Docker environments, limiting applicability to other platforms.
The skill lacks a dedicated examples section with realistic demonstrations, making it harder to validate the steps.
The wget command downloads the Zabbix release package without verifying its checksum.
